title: Dubious Dweller
description: I thought the Cave Dwellers textures were a little sloppy so I made my own :3
body:
I realized there isn't a lot of texture replacements for this guy (at least none that I personally preferred) so I decided to make my own for sake of my sanity.

Original Mod: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cave-dweller

I don't know anything about making it compatible with different versions but you are fully free to do so yourself, I just have never made one of these before and am clueless.
